title: P11: Factory Feature Orchestration — Feature Manifest + Execute Resolver
intent: Enable feature-level orchestration in the factory. Add feature manifest artifact type (factory/features/), stateless execute resolver (factory:execute) that reads feature + dependency graph + completion state to determine which packets are ready for parallel agent spawn, and --feature filter on factory:status. The LLM orchestrates by calling factory:execute in a loop — each call is stateless, reads disk, and outputs the next action.
acceptance_criteria: Completed and accepted prior to factory v0.1 migration
